subcodes.first_line: Throughout all days, this Wronged One hath, like unto the sun, shone forth from the horizon of the heaven of Revelation. By the life of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع ایام این مظلوم بمثابه شمس از افق سماء ظهور ظاهر و مشرق لعمر الله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
